# 01 — Wire state snapshot PUT/GET for persistence across reloads

Status: ready-for-agent
Labels: enhancement

*This was generated by AI during triage.*

## What

The backend has `PUT /api/sessions/{id}/state` and `GET /api/sessions/{id}/state` (`application/octet-stream`). The frontend never calls them. Closing a tab loses all content — there is no persistence.

## Requirements

### On load — restore state
- After the backend UUID is known (from the bootstrap in `EditorPage.tsx`), call `GET /api/sessions/{backendId}/state`
- If the response is 204 (no content yet), do nothing
- If 200, apply the blob to the Yjs doc: `Y.applyUpdate(doc, new Uint8Array(blob))`
- This must happen before the WS provider connects to avoid applying a snapshot on top of already-synced state from peers; or apply only if the doc is empty

### On change — save state (debounced)
- Observe the Yjs doc with `doc.on('update', ...)` 
- Debounce 5 seconds of inactivity, then encode: `Y.encodeStateAsUpdate(doc)`
- `PUT /api/sessions/{backendId}/state` with the encoded bytes, `Content-Type: application/octet-stream`
- On 423 (session locked), silently skip

### Interaction with encryption
- When `e2e-encryption/01` is done, the snapshot bytes must be encrypted before PUT and decrypted after GET
- Implement the unencrypted version first; add the encryption wrapper in the encryption issue

## Context

- `src/lib/api.ts` — add two functions: `fetchState(id: string): Promise<Uint8Array | null>` and `putState(id: string, blob: Uint8Array): Promise<void>`
- `src/pages/EditorPage.tsx` — `backendIdRef.current` holds the UUID once bootstrap completes; hook the load and save effects here or in a dedicated hook
- Backend `PUT` rejects with 423 if `session.isLocked()` — the frontend should handle this gracefully (no error toast needed, just skip)
- Note: `SessionService.java:56` currently resets `expiresAt` to `now+7d` on every snapshot write (see `backend-fixes/01`). This is a separate issue to fix independently.

## Acceptance

- Type content in tab A, wait 5 seconds, close tab A
- Open same URL in tab B → content is restored from the backend

## Files

- `src/lib/api.ts` (frontend repo) — new functions
- `src/pages/EditorPage.tsx` or `src/hooks/useStateSnapshot.ts` (frontend repo)
